title: SQLancer project_bte: does not match always
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INT, b BOOLEAN, c VARCHAR(255), UNIQUE(a, b));
INSERT INTO t1(a, b) VALUES(1, TRUE);
INSERT INTO t1(a, b) VALUES(2, FALSE);
INSERT INTO t1(a, c) VALUES(3, (CASE WHEN 1 > 0 THEN 'Positive' ELSE 'Negative' END));
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE (b IS NOT NULL) AND (a NOT BETWEEN 1 AND 3);
key_bug_features: INSERT statements with complex boolean expressions
